1: For I am am poor and needy.
2: O thou my God, save thy servant that trusteth in thee.
3: For I cry unto thee daily.
4: For unto thee, O Lord, do I lift up my soul.
5: And plenteous in mercy unto all them that call upon thee.
6: And attend to the voice of my supplications.
8: Neither are there any works are there any works like unto thy works.
11: Unite my heart to fear thy name.
12: And I will glorify thy name for evermore.
13: And thou hast delivered my soul from the lowest hell.
14: And the assemblies of violent men men have sought after my soul; And have not set thee before them.
15: Longsuffering, and plenteous in mercy and truth.
16: Give thy strength unto thy servant, and save the son of thine handmaid.
17: Because thou, LORD LORD , hast holpen me, and comforted me.
